content: Strangely enough, it started before I even had any sexual awareness. I want to say as early as the age of 6 or 7 years. I try to rationalize it in the sense that I had a subconscious premonition of separation and lonesomeness (not necessarily loneLIness) and learned at an early stage to compensate for the infrequency of close physical gratification from other sources. As such, I don't really feel shame...more a certain emptiness from lack of intimacy.
